name: neko-lucia-monorepo
description: Server-side sessions for Node and Deno with Lucia v3 migration support

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ducheved/neko-lucia run build && pnpm -r --filter @ducheved/neko-lucia --filter @ducheved/neko-lucia-adapter-drizzle run test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ducheved/neko-lucia run build && pnpm -r --filter @ducheved/neko-lucia --filter @ducheved/neko-lucia-adapter-drizzle run typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build

author: Ducheved
